title: Show My Coordinates
description: Do you want to see your Coordinates? Now you can! And it's fully customizable.
body:
![Show My Coordinates banner](https://i.ibb.co/khbwCzy/banner.png)
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📝About:**
Do you want to see your Coordinates? Now you can! And it's fully customizable.
![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **⚙️Features:**
- In-game overlay UI text **(V1.0 < [Hud Texts mod])**
- Actionbar
- Fully customizable
- Show if you have a specific item
- You can use color codes
- You can set the text position: Top Left, Top Center, Top Right, Bottom Left, Bottom Center, Bottom right. **(V1.0 < [Hud Texts mod])**

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **❗️Required mods:**
- Hud Texts | From V1.1

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **✅Compatible mods:**
[![](https://media.forgecdn.net/avatars/858/143/638263226574933812.png)](https://modrinth.com/mod/hud-texts)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **💬Languages:**
- English

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **📜Our partner:**
![Partner](https://i.ibb.co/JqPjJKf/bisect-hosting2.png)

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **💡Ideas:**
- If you have an idea which makes the mod better then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#💡idea-suggestions** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
### **👾Bugs:**
- If you have found a bug then,
- please write it on our discord server in the **#🧰bug-reports** forum.

![](https://i.ibb.co/p0nYcGM/infos.png)
